overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a sunlit urban street in Night City. The player passes an NCPD police van and abandoned vehicles, crosses a busy intersection beneath holographic advertisements, walks under a massive Delamain billboard structure, and continues toward the city's edge where industrial zones meet desert scrubland and hillside shanties.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with palm trees and police presence

events.description: passing the parked police van on the right side of the sidewalk
approaching the intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the city sidewalk past abandoned vehicles and palm trees

notable_agents.action: NCPD police van parked on sidewalk with body lying nearby
abandoned rusted cars in a fenced parking lot

entered.detail: large rectangular billboard with Delamain logo mounted on orange metal framework
tall palm trees lining the concrete sidewalk
raised concrete highway structure with metal railings
tall modern skyscrapers with glass facades in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of an NCPD police van parked on the right side of a sunlit urban sidewalk. The player walks forward past abandoned vehicles and palm trees, with a large Delamain billboard visible on the left and futuristic skyscrapers rising in the distance. The scene transitions toward an intersection as the camera approaches the crosswalk.

events.description: stepping onto the crosswalk and beginning to cross the multi-lane street
reaching the opposite sidewalk and continuing forward

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection at the crosswalk while traffic passes by

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection
silver car passing through the intersection on the right

entered.detail: cylindrical green water tank elevated on metal support legs
white striped pedestrian crossing on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The player enters a wide urban intersection, crossing the street at the marked crosswalk. A distinctive green water tower stands in the center distance while various cars drive through the intersection. The Delamain billboard is now visible on the right side as the player moves to the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with massive billboard infrastructure

events.description: walking directly under the large Delamain billboard structure, temporarily obscuring the sky
passing colorful shipping containers and entering industrial edge zone

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing beneath the massive billboard structure and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: black SUV parked on the side of the road
distant cars driving down the multi-lane street

entered.detail: massive orange support pillars and framework for the Delamain billboard
brightly colored shipping containers in magenta, blue, and green behind a fence

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite side of the street, the player passes directly under the massive orange support structure of the Delamain billboard. The sidewalk runs alongside a fenced industrial lot containing brightly colored shipping containers. Parked cars line the street as the player continues toward the city's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial edge transitioning to desert scrubland

events.description: entering open area with desert scrub vegetation replacing urban structures
turning left to observe the hillside shanty settlement

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial buildings and turning to look at the desert hillside with informal settlements

entered.detail: dry desert bushes and scrub vegetation on sandy ground
informal settlement with small buildings built into the rocky hillside

segments.scene_description: The urban environment gives way to an industrial edge zone and then open desert scrubland. The player walks past the last of the industrial buildings and turns to observe a hillside shanty settlement built into the rocky terrain, with dry vegetation and dirt ground replacing the concrete sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a polished urban center into the rugged industrial fringes of the city. It begins on a sunlit sidewalk, moving past an NCPD police van and abandoned vehicles while futuristic skyscrapers loom in the distance. As the camera reaches a wide intersection, the scene shifts across a marked crosswalk toward a distant green water tower and passing traffic. The movement then carries the viewer directly under the massive orange support structure of a Delamain billboard and alongside a fenced lot of colorful shipping containers. Finally, the concrete environment gives way to an industrial edge zone before opening into a dry desert scrubland, where the camera turns toward a hillside shanty settlement built into the rocky terrain.
